subject: A large dark beetle-like creature with a glowing core bursts through a wall in an urban market, sending shards flying as two civilians flee
description: A massive, armored insectoid creature — dark and spiky with multiple writhing tentacle-like appendages and a central glowing orange core — bursts through a tree or wall structure in what appears to be a bright urban marketplace. The destruction sends green and red geometric shards exploding outward. To the left, a market stall with pink fabric is visible. Two humanoid figures flee to the right — one in a teal hood with arm raised, one in a red garment turning to run. Trees are visible in the mid-ground. The palette is bright and almost painterly: green, red-orange shards against a blue sky, with the creature itself dark and contrasting. The mood is sudden public terror.
foreground: large dark armored insectoid creature with glowing core bursting through a tree/wall, shards flying
background: bright urban market, blue sky, trees, fleeing civilians
emotion: panic in the scene — civilians flee, creature erupts
